commands.expected_exit_code: 0 when foundation checks pass; 1 when foundation checks fail.
commands.name: Bootstrap Check
commands.notes: Autonomous mode may still be blocked even when this passes.
commands.purpose: Validate AXIOM passive bootstrap foundation checks.
commands.when_to_run: After schema, manifest, boot verifier, or bootstrap-validation changes.

commands.expected_exit_code: 0 when database is initialized; 1 when database is not initialized.
commands.name: Status Check
commands.notes: Reports fail-closed non-autonomous state without repairing it.
commands.when_to_run: When you need to see current foundation/autonomous/safe-pass state.

commands.name: Repair Session State
commands.purpose: Align latest session with fail-closed state when no current trusted model profile exists.
commands.when_to_run: After model profile registration, bootstrap work, or suspicious session-state drift.

commands.expected_exit_code: 0 when autonomous operation is allowed; 2 when blocked.
commands.name: Autonomous Readiness Check
commands.notes: Exit code 2 is expected in the current fail-closed non-autonomous state.
commands.purpose: Check whether AXIOM may enter autonomous operation.

commands.expected_exit_code: 0 when foundation is healthy; 1 when foundation fails.
commands.name: Verify Foundation
commands.notes: This is the main quick health command.
commands.purpose: Run the core operator checks together and report coherent foundation state.
commands.when_to_run: Before starting new implementation work or after completing a task.

commands.name: Snapshot Project State
commands.notes: Does not run pytest; records last-known test target.
commands.purpose: Write a timestamped JSON snapshot of AXIOM project/database state.
commands.when_to_run: Before handoff, debugging, or larger implementation transitions.

commands.name: Generate Handoff
commands.notes: Use --print to display the handoff in terminal.
commands.purpose: Generate a human-readable Markdown handoff from the latest project snapshot.
commands.when_to_run: Before moving to a new chat/session or briefing another model.

commands.name: Operator Command Index
commands.notes: Use --json, --markdown, or --write for alternate output formats.
commands.purpose: Show available operator commands and their intended use.
commands.when_to_run: When unsure which maintenance or verification command to run next.

commands.name: Full Pytest Suite
commands.notes: Current expected target after this task is 210 passed.
commands.purpose: Run the full AXIOM regression suite.
